title: pleopeltis murorum
intro: Pleopeltis murorum, also known as the wall polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The plant's extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing oxidative stress. Pleopeltis murorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
